width_metadata.notes: Typical width 12 m; main straight up to 14 m.

svg_source.attribution: Wikimedia Commons — Circuit Paul Ricard 2020 layout map.svg

surface_metadata.notes: Paul Ricard HTTT Blue Line™: ~18 m blue zone (asphalt+tungsten), ~6 m red abrasive zone, Tecpro beyond. T4 retains gravel; Beausset double kerbs.
